name: Guide to Judy's book free business listing
description: Improve your service discoverability by claiming your business listing on Judy’s Book.
main_title: Guide to Judy's book free business listing
richtext:
Today’s consumers use every search tool imaginable to locate quality services for your home. As a business owner, if you want to get noticed and stay successful, then claiming business listings on all available search engines and tools is essential. Judy’s Book is a top-rated search tool that is used by people across the United States to find reputable professional services. However, most business owners do not think to claim their listing at this site. Doing so will help you to enhance the online presence of your business.

Our simple guide below provides you with step-by-step instructions on how to sign up and claim your account. Judy’s Book allows you to add photos, videos, coupons, offers, an owner message and other details to get noticed and stay at the top of the search engine results. Claim your listing today to take advantage of Judy’s Book benefits.

Step 1

To get started, go to www.judysbook.com/businesscenter/claimbusiness.aspx. From here, you need to click on the Claim Business box to begin filling in your business details.

Claim your business

On the next page, you will find details on the type of Judy’s Book listings you can access. The Basic subscription is $19.92 a month and the Pro option is $79.92 a month. Each listing type offers a certain number of features such as photos, service areas, listing and claiming multiple locations, keywords, dedicated account manager, etc.

Review all the features for a claimed listing and see which service option works best for you. You can always start with the Basic package and upgrade to Pro at a later date. You also have the option to pay monthly or a yearly rate. Select Claim Now with the package you prefer.

Step 2

Next, you will need to fill in details about yourself and the business. This includes your first and last name, email address, phone number and company name.

Fill out your business profile and contact information

This is also the section where you will pay for your subscription. Once the information has been filled out, accept the Privacy Policy and Terms of Service to continue. Then click Sign Up to join.

Step 3

Now that you have an account at Judy’s Book, take advantage of the services offered for your subscription. Add photos to your profile along with coupons or offers to drum up business. You have full control of your listing via the Owner Dashboard.

From this are of the site, you can make changes instantly to your profile. Update your information at any time with new business details, service areas, keywords, and more. Building a strong profile helps you to get noticed more often, which means more business of you!

Once you've claimed/created your listing, you can update your profile from the dashboard anytime

Sign up and claim your business listing today to get started.
join_title: Spend More Time Running Your Business
join_description: And, less time obsessing about your local presence
